name: harness-upgrade
description: Draft an initial harness-engineering layer for existing repositories.

interface.longDescription: Assess an existing repository, ask minimal owner questions, and draft docs-only harness guidance for review.
defaultPrompt: Use Harness Upgrade to assess this repository and produce a pass-1 harness-readiness report.
Use Harness Upgrade to reconcile owner answers and draft docs-only harness updates for this repository.
